title: ExpenseReportLine

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

expense_date.description: The date the individual expense was incurred.

amount.description: The amount of the expense for the line item.

currency.description: Currency of the expense line (if different from the report currency). The currency code in ISO 4217 format.

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate used if the line item is in a foreign currency.

is_billable.description: Whether the expense line is billable to a client or project.

tracking_categories.description: The related tracking categories associated with the expense report (Department, Location, Class, Expense Category)

employee.description: Identifier for the employee who submitted or is associated with the expense report

company.description: The subsidiary that the expense report is created in

quantity.description: Quantity for the expense line (e.g., miles driven, items purchased).

unit_price.description: Price per unit for the expense line (if applicable).

non_reimbursable.description: Whether the expense line is non-reimbursable (e.g., paid via company card).

tax_amount.description: Tax amount applicable for the line item.

inclusive_of_tax.description: Whether the amount is inclusive of tax.

remote_was_deleted.description: Indicates whether or not this object has been deleted in the third party platform. Full coverage deletion detection is a premium add-on. Native deletion detection is offered for free with limited coverage. [Learn more](https://docs.merge.dev/integrations/hris/supported-features/).

description:
# The ExpenseReportLine Object
### Description
The `ExpenseReportLine` object represents an individual line item within an expense report, containing details about
a specific expense such as amount, description, and associated metadata.

### Usage Example
Fetch from the `GET ExpenseReport` endpoint and expand the lines field to view all line items in the expense report.
